title: MINKY SmartFit Ironing Board Cover, Assorted designs and colors, Fits Boards up to 125 x 45 cm
features: • Fits all standard ironing boards up to 125 x 45 cm
• Thick felt backing for a smoother, faster finish
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare SmartFit Ironing Board Covers Minky are one of the UK’s leading homewares and laundry manufacturers. Most of their products are manufactured in the UK and 2016 will mark their 75th anniversary of trading. Smart Fit Ironing Board Covers Manufactured in the UK Fits in seconds Super tight pre-tensioned elastic Smoother ironing surface Thick felt backing Durable and long lasting Machine washable What is Smart Fit? Minky Smart Fit ironing board cover has been designed to fit all standard sized ironing boards. This one size fits all cover can be fitted with ease and speed and the tight, pre-tensioned elastic edging ensures a right fit on all boards up to 125 x 45 cms. The thick felt backing provides a smooth ironing surface to optimise your ironing comfort. The Smart Fit range also includes a felt pad, reflector cover and reversible cover to suit all your ironing needs. The vibrant cover designs will help to brighten up your home. Smart Fit Range Smart Fit Felt Pad This thick felt pad provides your ironing board with a smooth base layer. It will fit all standard boards up to 125 x 45 cms. You simply cut to the shape required then place your ironing board cover on top. Smart Fit Cover This versatile cover can be fitted to any standard sized ironing board in seconds. The high quality material combined with a thick felt backing provides a smooth hard wearing ironing surface. The cover is machine washable offering freshness with every use. Smart Fit Reflector This Smart Fit cover has heat reflective dots which are designed to quickly remove creases and speed up the ironing process. It has a thick felt backing for a smooth, fast finish to your ironing. Smart Fit Reversible Designed with a colourful pattern on both sides, this cover lasts twice as long as usual - you simply turn it over and reuse. It has an extra thick triple layer structure which is soft and durable to provide a nice ironing surface. With tight elastic it fits all standard boards and because it's double sided you can get a fresh look in seconds.
